pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; keeping Java 11 settings would result in incompatibility with Java 21 features or runtime environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version from 2.5.2 to 3.3.13 to support Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; upgrading is required for compatibility with the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Rest Assured version from 4.4.0 to 5.1.1 for compatibility with newer dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Rest Assured may have compatibility issues with Spring Boot 3.x or Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not correctly handle Java 21 source/target or release flags.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 and JUnit 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-surefire-plugin may fail to execute tests on Java 21 or with newer JUnit versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-failsafe-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 and JUnit 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-failsafe-plugin may fail to execute integration tests on Java 21 or with newer JUnit versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace source and target compiler configuration with the release flag for Java 9+ compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The source and target flags are deprecated in favor of the release flag in modern Java versions; using them may cause warnings or errors in newer compiler plugins.
